text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I said I'd win it this time—that today<n>would be the
day. I made sure to<n>prepare myself, and even my
predictions were in my favor...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urghhh! What am I supposed to do<n>now?!
choice_data_list: Don't get flustered. Just keep on keeping on.
When times get tough, turn to divination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That sounded just like one of<n>the
revelations from my fortune slips!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thinking about it that way, perhapsyou're my fortune slip!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, oh thank you! Please<n>continue to guide
me with your<n>precious teachings!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And please accept this as a token of<n>my
appreciation! It's a charm that<n>prevents you from
stubbing your<n>pinkie toe!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If nothing else, it looks like she's<n>back to her
cheery self.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I can't believe I lost sight ofnot only myself, but the very essenceof divination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The eye to my soul has awoken!<n>Beep, beep!
Let's get to predicting<n>right away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The angle of my ears alludes to thephrase, "Where there's a will,there's a way"! Then I will do...some training!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Out of respect for<n>Matikanefukukitaru's
determination, I<n>add some extra laps to her current
training regimen.
